purpose: Return triggered secondary risk/data-completeness signals for one claim. The result supports analyst routing only.

input.claim_id: Required claim identifier, for example CLM-000183.

empty_result_meaning: No risk indicator was triggered. It does not mean the claim is covered, complete, or approved.
guardrails: Return only triggered risk signals associated with the requested claim.
Risk results may only route to MANUAL_REVIEW; never NOT_ELIGIBLE.
Do not state or imply fraud, misconduct, or intentional deception.
Do not ask the customer to explain an internal risk signal.
Cite source references in the analyst handoff.
